events.content: Implement fork server state in the existing Go Store: Implement fork server state in the existing Go Store

raw.question: Implement fork server state in the existing Go Store
raw.chosen: Implement fork server state in the existing Go Store
raw.reasoning: main has no apps/relayfile Durable Object worker; the routed server is internal/httpapi over internal/relayfile.Store, so fork state will live as pointer-plus-overlay store state with timers emulating DO alarms.
